resources.string: Update feeds and download episodes using Pull-To-Refresh
When sharing episode, attach the downloaded episode file. Enable when sharing to DropBox, Google Drive etc.
Sync episode played position only if the remote position is further (after) the current position
Do not change! (unless you know what you are doing)
Enter a custom path where BeyondPod will store downloaded podcast episodes

"EpisodeSync synchronizes feeds and played positions of episodes between multiple devices.
EpisodeSync is currently in a limited BETA and may have occasional glitches.
If you want to participate in this BETA, you can find more information on our support forum: www.beyondpod.com/forum"
Default timeout in seconds for http connections when updating feeds or downloading podcasts
Enter a full user agent string or MO (for Mozilla) or IE (for Internet Explorer)
Keeps the screen On if updating over WiFi. (Check if WiFi updates fail often)
OK... but BeyondPod will not be able to access your storage card (update feeds or download/delete/move episodes)
Thanks! BeyondPod can now access your storage card.

"Oops... Something is not right!
BeyondPod was granted a permission to access your storage card, but for some reason still can't write to it.
Try restarting the device."
"Permission granted! Please try your action again."

"You are probably not logged in to Feedly or your last session has expired!
Use the Login button below to log in and then try to update your feed again"

"BeyondPod failed to write to your Storage card!
In some cases this issue can be fixed by restarting the device or, if restarting does not work, by reformatting the SD card."
BeyondPod needs a permission to access your storage (SD) card.
BeyondPod needs a permission to save episodes to your storage (SD) card.

"Due to the external storage card restrictions introduced in Android KitKat, BeyondPod can no longer write to your current download folder.
Use: Settings > General Settings > Podcast Download Folder to select a different download folder."
Backs up BeyondPod settings and Feed subscriptions. Downloaded episodes will NOT be backed up

"Your current Backup Location is a folder that will be deleted if you uninstall BeyondPod.
If you want to keep your backups, we suggest to use 'Share Backup' to export them to DropBox, Google Drive, e-mail etc. to be stored outside your device!"

"%s of your feeds are password protected!
Feed passwords will be included in the backup, and it is possible for a malicious person to gain access to them.
Make sure to keep the backup file SAFE!"
There are no backup files in %s
Restore BeyondPod settings and Feed Subscriptions

"Restore complete!
BeyondPod will now restart to apply the new settings."

"You are about to restore a backup of BeyondPod ver. %s made on %s at: %s!
This will overwrite your settings, feeds and download history.
Continue with restore?"
Send a backup to another device (Using e-mail or a file sharing service like Dropbox, Google Drive, Box.com etc.)
A user friendly category name (for example News, Music, Sports etc.)
"• Scheduled updates will start at the specified 'start time' and will run until midnight of the same day. • Only" one scheduled update can run at a given time!
In BeyondPod, feed updates are scheduled at category level. The schedule below will update and download new episodes for all feeds in this category.
A category with that name already exists!
Please make sure that start times are at least 15 minutes apart!
The start time of this update overlaps with category
Our EpisodeSync BETA test group is currently full. We hope to add more users soon, watch our forum for the latest info.

"We sent a verification e-mail to: %s
Please open the link in this e-mail to activate your account!"
Your account is not yet active!
Once you create an EpisodeSync account, use the same account for all devices you want to sync
EpisodeSync synchronizes feeds and played positions of episodes between multiple devices. See %s for more information.
Password too short! Enter 5 or more symbols
Send Feed to my Other Devices
"Unable to connect to BeyondPod servers! Try again later"
"Your BeyondPod trial has expired! EpisodeSync is available only in the 'Pro' version of BeyondPod."
When episodes are deleted on my other devices, also delete them from this device.
Accept feeds from my other devices
%1$s werkt niet, tenzij je Google Play-services inschakelt.
%1$s kan niet worden uitgevoerd zonder Google Play-services, die je nog niet op je apparaat hebt.
%1$s ondervindt problemen met Google Play-services. Probeer het opnieuw.
%1$s kan niet worden uitgevoerd zonder Google Play-services, die niet worden ondersteund op je apparaat.
%1$s kan niet worden uitgevoerd, tenzij je Google Play-services updatet.
%1$s kan niet worden uitgevoerd zonder Google Play-services, die momenteel worden geüpdatet.
Er is een nieuwe versie van Google Play-services vereist. De update wordt binnenkort automatisch uitgevoerd.
Are you sure you want to delete

"Are you sure you want to delete category:
%s?"

"Are you sure you want to delete:
%s?
(This will also delete all downloaded podcast episodes for this feed.)"

"Are you sure you want to delete:
%s?"

"Are you sure you want to delete:
%s"

"For questions or comments visit
www.beyondpod.com
Copyright BeyondPod Team 2008–2014 All rights reserved.
Open Source Licenses www.beyondpod.mobi/osl"
Feed Cache is located on your storage card and contains local versions of your feeds.
"Causes BeyondPod to reload episode images from device's media database."
Do not show this message again

"BeyondPod allows you to play episodes at faster (or slower) speeds.
"Playback speed support is currently in BETA and may not work reliably on all devices or podcast formats.

"Unable to connect to the feed's web site.
The feed address may be invalid or the web site may have temporary connectivity issues."

"Most likely the URL is for the web page that accompanies the feed instead of the RSS feed itself. Try opening this web page in a web browser and look for a direct link to the RSS feed.
Tap on the 'Help' button below for tips on how to locate RSS feed links in web pages."

"It appears that this is a URL to iTunes version of the feed.
Tap on the 'Help' button below for instructions on how to locate RSS feed links in iTunes."

"The feed URL does not appear to be a valid RSS or Atom feed.
%s"

"It appears that this is a URL to an MP3 file of a single show episode. Try opening podcast's web page in a web browser an look for a direct link to the RSS feed.
Tap on the 'Help' button below for tips on how to locate RSS feed links."

"Your BeyondPod trial has expired!
Changing of playback speed is available only in the 'Pro' version of BeyondPod."
When your trial expires, BeyondPod reverts to a Lite version where some of the convenience features of the Pro" version are disabled. "
Your full feature trial of BeyondPod has expired on
Your full feature trial of BeyondPod will expire on
Disable and hide Playback Speed button
To enable speed control at a later time, use Settings > Player Settings > Playback Speed.
If playback speed does not work reliably on your device it can be disabled in: Settings > Player Settings > Playback Speed.
This episode can be played only at Normal speed

"Streamed episodes can be played only at Normal speed.
Download episode before playing."

"It appears that BeyondPod is installed on the SD card. While BeyondPod can be used that way, there are 2 limitations that you must be aware of:
• BeyondPod widgets will not be available. • Mounting the SD card as USB storage will cancel all future scheduled feed updates until BeyondPod is restarted.
"If your device has sufficient space, it is recommended that you move BeyondPod to the device memory.
Are you sure you want to mark ALL episodes in this feed as PLAYED?
Are you sure you want to mark ALL posts in this feed as READ?

"You can try opening selected item in an external application.
Tap 'Continue' and BeyondPod will find any installed applications that may display this content type. You can also change the default audio or video player to 'External' in BeyondPod Settings"

"Episode downloads can consume large amount of data!
We recommend using a WiFi connection or an unlimited data plan."

"This will update all feeds in the current category and, if configured in the feed, download latest podcast episodes.
Episode downloads can use large amount of data. We recommend using a WiFi connection or an unlimited data plan."
It appears that the Internet connection was interrupted. Please try again later.

"The format of this video is not supported by the default video player.
(Some videos can only be played by an external video player. Tap on 'Player Help' for more information)"

"
Mobiel internet en WiFi-verbindingen zijn beide mogelijk!"
Onvoldoende ruimte om te downloaden ! Nodig:

"
Mobile verbindingen niet zijn toegestaan. (U kunt het gebruik van mobiele verbindingen zoals GPRS/EDGE/3 G/UMTS in de sectie 'Feed Update' van BeyondPod instellingen toestaan)"
Het is niet mogelijk om een internetverbinding tot stand te brengen!

"
Het downloaden van podcasts is momenteel enkel toegestaan via WiFi-verbinding. (U kunt het downloaden van podcasts mogelijk maken over elke verbinding via \"Feed Update\" in de BeyondPod instellingen)"
Naar nieuwe episodes aan het zoeken
"BeyondPod was unable to access the Storage Card! The card could have errors or is write protected!"

"
(On some devices, manually creating this folder may fix the issue. Alternatively, try using a different SD card)"

"BeyondPod was unable to access your Storage Card!
The storage card is currently unmounted or in use by your PC."
An error was encountered when trying to access your storage card. Please check the card for errors.
BeyondPod was unable to find a Storage Card on your device!

"We found a previous BeyondPod installation in: '%s' folder. To use it, BeyondPod needs a permission to access your storage (SD) card.
If you prefer a 'clean' install simply exit BeyondPod, delete the folder above and try again."

"Failed to connect to Feedly or your login may have expired.
Try to log in again later."

"Failed to connect to Feedly!
Please try again later"

"There is not enough free space to download this episode.
This episode requires %s to download, but you have only %s free in '%s'"
Failed to Add Feedly Subscription for feed
Invalid or expired Feedly login! (You can modify your Feedly login in: Add Feed > Import Feeds > Import From Feedly)
"No feed is selected. Please select a feed from the feed list (left drawer)"
This feed is set to load the first %s posts from Feedly.
If all your posts appear as \"Read\", you may not be subscribed for this feed in Feedly.

"The feed you are trying to open may require a special login.
Often premium or paid feeds require re-login on their web site when your Internet address changes (for example when connecting to WiFi or mobile network).
Press the 'Help' button below for more information."

"There was an error during the last feed update!
""Often this is caused by a temporary problem with the Internet connection or issues with the feed publisher's web site.
Try to update the feed again later. If you continue to have problems, press the HELP button below for troubleshooting tips."
There are no feeds in this category

"There was a problem with the feed URL you are using, but we were able to find a different URL:
%s
that is most likely the one you need.
Do you want to use it?"

"Controls if local episodes in this feed can be automatically deleted (to make space for new episodes during update or at the end of playback). 'Allow Episode Deletions' must be checked if you want to use automatic episode cleanup features."
Controls if the episodes in this feed (and all sub feeds) can be automatically deleted to make space for new episodes (for example at the end of the playback).
You can configure default settings used when adding new feeds here.

"To assign a custom image to this feed, save a PNG or JPG image somewhere on your SD card and make sure that it is visible in the device's Image Gallery application. Use the 'Select Image' button above to find and select the image from the Gallery. (After assigning the image, you can delete the image from the Gallery)."

BeyondPod keeps track of episodes that it has previously downloaded for each feed. Clicking on \"Clear Feed Download History\" will delete the download history for this feed and all episodes for this feed will appear as if they were never downloaded. \"Mark All as Downloaded\" does the opposite - it will mark all new feed episodes as already downloaded (without actually having to download them).
You can assign up to 2 categories for this feed. Assigning a feed to a category will also automatically include the feed in the update schedule set for that category (if any).
This is folder where BeyondPod will download the episodes for this feed. Leave it empty if you want to use the default download location (currently %s) or the feed does not have episodes.
At startup BeyondPod will scan this folder (and all sub folders) and show all files it finds as \"virtual podcasts\" that can be played in the internal player.
If the episode name is too long to display, select which part of the name you prefer to be truncated.
Set the sort order for the locally downloaded or streamable episodes of this feed.

Select how BeyondPod should detect duplicate episodes. (WARNING! Change only if the feed often re-downloads old episodes. Changing this setting will reset the download and read/unread history for the feed).
If your feed requires a user name and password for access, you can enter them in the fields above.
A user friendly name of the feed. (If you leave it blank the name will be populated from the feed data)
Web address of the RSS feed (usually starts with http:// or https://)
Select the order you want to see the items (posts) of this feed in the Feed Content View.

If checked, forces BeyondPod to give unique file name to each downloaded podcast, instead of trying to guess the name from the podcast Url. Check if you find that podcasts are always given the same name and end up overwriting each other.

"Download selected number of episodes starting from the oldest available. New episodes will download only when you delete some of the already downloaded episodes for this feed. Downloaded episodes will appear on the 'Episodes' screen."
• Download %s in order, starting from the oldest.
"Download selected number of latest episodes as part of the feed Update. New episodes will automatically replace oldest episodes. Downloaded episodes will appear on the 'Episodes' screen."
• Download latest %s and keep at most %s.%s
Any episodes for this feed will be ignored and not show in the Feed Content Screen.
Podcast episodes for this feed will NOT be automatically downloaded. (Any episode can still be downloaded manually)

"Create \"streamable\" versions for selected number of episodes, starting from the oldest available. New episodes will download only when you delete some of the already downloaded episodes for this feed. Streamed episodes will appear on the 'Episodes' screen."
"• Get %s in order, starting from the oldest. • Episodes will be 'streamed' (device needs to be online to play them)."

"Create \"streamable\" versions for selected number of latest episodes as part of the feed Update. New episodes will automatically replace oldest episodes. Streamed episodes will appear on the 'Episodes' screen."
"• Get latest %s and keep at most %s.%s • Episodes will be 'streamed' (device needs to be online to play them)."
Set a preferred playback speed for the podcast episodes of this feed. (Leave un-checked to use the playback speed that is currently set in the player).
Occasionally, feeds may contain multiple formats of the same episode (for example mp4 and wmv). Use the selector above to pick the preferred format.
When playing, remembers that played portion for the episodes in this feed

Episode Cleanup will automatically delete old podcast episodes when their number or age exceeds the selected values above. (Cleanup rules are executed only when new episodes are about to be downloaded for this feed)
Load the content of this feed from Feedly. Requires a Feedly.com account to use it.
Images from Picasa albums (or other online galleries) cannot be used as a feed image.
Please enter a valid Feed Name!
Please enter a Feed URL or Feed Name!
Selected virtual feed folder is empty or does not exist on the device!
The number of podcast episodes to download cannot exceed the number of podcast episodes to keep!
"Selected 'Episode Cleanup' settings require %s of your existing episodes to be deleted."

You can add an extra volume boost when playing episodes of this feed. (This is an experimental feature! Volume Boost is available only for downloaded audio episodes and only when Playback Speed is enabled).
"De feed ' %s' werd toegevoegd in de categorie '%s'"
No, I want to download my episodes manually.
Let BeyondPod download latest episodes while you are asleep.
BeyondPod can check for new episodes and download them automatically. (You can change your preferences later in settings).
Download episodes only if connected to a WiFi.
Pick some topics you like and we will suggest a few good podcasts to get you started.
"Some episodes failed to download! Please try again later"

"We are sorry, but your feed repository appears to be corrupted and all repair attempts failed!
Next time you start BeyondPod your feed subscriptions will be reset to the install defaults.
BeyondPod will now exit!"
"OK… You can still do a 'clean' install by deleting the previous BeyondPod installation."
You are now logged out from Feedly
BeyondPod has been updated to version %s!
"Tap on the folder name to open it. To import a folder, tap on the + icon next to it."

"Your trial has expired!
You can update or download only 1 feed or episode at a time.
Use 'Go PRO!' (in the left navigation drawer) to see what else is restricted."
"To unlock this episode, first enable 'Allow Episode Deletions' in the advanced settings of the episode's feed."
Are you sure you want to cancel?

"Move complete!%s
BeyondPod will now restart to apply the new settings."
"Are you sure you want to move %s of downloaded episodes from: '%s' to '%s'?"
Destination folder %s already exists! Do you want to overwrite it?
The destination folder is unavailable or Read Only!

"Android KitKat has introduced some restrictions for the use of the External SD card.
You can still move episode download folder to the External SD card, but all BeyondPod settings and downloaded episodes WILL BE DELETED when you uninstall BeyondPod."
You need at least %s of free space in the destination folder. Currently only %s are available!
Unable to clean some files in %s. Try to clean them manually!

"The old episode download folder %s is Read Only and BeyondPod can't clean it up.
Connect the device to a computer and use a File Explorer to delete this folder."

"Update or download is currently in progress!
Please stop it and try again."
"%s (%s is also available as an alternate location)"

"%s
does not exist or is Read Only!"

"Use the 'Move' button below to move your existing episodes to an alternative location.
Once the move is complete, BeyondPod will restart and switch to use the new location.
Move process could take several minutes to complete."

"All your feeds will be exported to an OPML file named 'BeyondPodFeeds.opml', located in:
'%s'
The feeds will be grouped by their first category."
"Make sure the OPML file has an extension .OPML and is copied to: '%s'"

"Selected directory is currently unavailable!
Please try again later."
Select a speed with the slider, then tap a preset button to save it

"Streaming is curently disabled.
Download episode before playing it."
Streaming is currently allowed only over a WiFi connection!

"Connected to '%s'
Select an episode to play it remotely."
"Updating feeds… Latest episodes will appear shortly."
"You have not downloaded any episodes for category '%s'."
"You have not downloaded any episodes for '%s'."
"There are no episodes matching your current filter '%s'."
"Can't find episodes you are looking for?"

"Your BeyondPod trial has expired!
Playing on remote displays is available only in the 'Pro' version of BeyondPod"

"Configured episode download location (%s) is no longer available!
If you are using an External SD card, the card may be removed, unmounted or configured as ReadOnly. Your Internal SD card (%s) is still available.
Do you want to switch to use your Internal SD card instead?"

"Configured episode download location (%s) is no longer available!
Please select a new location below:"
All Tips and Warnings are now re-enabled!
Advertentie toestaan om afbeelding op te slaan in fotogalerij?
Advertentie toestaan om een agenda-afspraak te maken?

"BeyondPod allows you to update all feeds on a single schedule, or set different update schedules per category.
Which method do you want to use?
(You can change your preference later using 'Manage Categories' on the left navigation drawer)"
An error has occurred while searching. Please try again later.
You must be online to add feeds.
When SmartPlay is selected, automatically play the first episode
When SmartPlay is rebuilt, keep the current episode at the top of the playlist
"Automatically rebuilds the 'default' SmartPlay when new episodes are downloaded"
Automatically creates a new playlist starting with selected episode
When clearing the playlist, keep the current episode at the top of the playlist
Double click of the wired headset button
Long press of the wired headset button
Next button of wired or bluetooth headset
Previous button of wired or bluetooth headset
Customize actions for the buttons of bluetooth or wired headset
Pause on headset disconnect, power disconnect, notification, configure screen timeout…
Automatically removes played episodes from the playlist
Theme for the main BeyondPod Window (light or dark)
Help us improve BeyondPod by gathering anonymous usage data and errors.
Enables feed cleanup rules for podcasts that are downloaded manually
"Allows hiding of 'Read' items or 'Played' episodes on the 'All Published' screen and displays feed/episode dates on the feed list and playlist."
Allow hiding of Read or Played
Controls if episode streaming (playing episodes without downloading) is allowed
Check if you allow the use of mobile (EDGE/3G/4G) connection for feed updates.
Allows viewing of some videos that are embedded in the post content.
"Automatically delete all played episodes as part of the next update. (Episodes marked as 'Favorite' are not deleted)"
Automatically retry downloading any partially downloaded episodes as part of the next update
Number of seconds to skip backward during playback (commercial skip)
Notify me when a new public BETA version of BeyondPod is available
Check if you want to hide the notification icon at the end of update
Default set of e-mail addresses when e-mailing article links from BeyondPod

"When you disable sharing, due to a bug in some versions of Android, some of your downloaded VIDEO podcasts may be deleted at the first device restart (or SD card rescan).
Make sure to backup any downloaded video podcasts that you don't want to lose.
You can find downloaded podcasts in 'BeyondPod/Podcasts' folder of your SD card."

"Some of your feeds are specific to Feedly and cannot be disconnected:
%s You have to delete them manually."

"The following feeds will be disconnected from Feedly and redirected to go directly to their original publishers:
%s Downloaded or streamable episodes will be preserved, but the Read and Download history for these feeds will be lost."
Download podcast episodes only if device is charging.
Download episodes only if connected to a WiFi network.
Softly increases the volume from zero to normal level when playback starts
Use the headset or bluetooth buttons to control the playback
Use Presto audio plugin if installed (restart is required)
Enables native support for variable playback speed (Jelly Bean and later only)
"Default view when selecting a feed ('My Episodes' or 'All Published')"
Select the sort order for your list of feeds (the left drawer)
Global feed settings when subscribing to new feeds (number episodes to download, cleanup rules)…
Use the feed album art for audio episodes
Forces fast playback to use the mpg123 based audio player
Number of seconds to skip forward during playback (commercial skip)
Theme, Home Screen, Global sort, feed and episode settings…
Hides media file types that the device cannot Play
"Check if you DO NOT want to synchronize the 'Read' status of posts with Feedly."
"When player is paused, leave the 'Paused' notification in the notification tray."
Double-tap on the post content to close the post view
Controls which posts should be marked as \"Read\" when viewing the post content
For each feed, delete podcast episodes that are older than given number of days
Action to take when the current episode finishes playing (delete, play next, etc.)
Default number of podcast episodes to download or stream for each feed
Default number of local podcast episodes to keep for each feed
Allows you to lock the screen orientation in portrait or landscape mode
Pauses playback during system notifications (Navigation, eMail, SMS etc.)
Pauses playback when the external power supply is disconnected.
Pauses the playback when the headset is disconnected
Pauses video playback when the screen is turned off.
"'External' will use device's built-in (or any 3rd party) player"
Use the plug-in only for feeds that are explicitly configured to play at a higher speed in their settings
Skip intervals, Headset Button, Streaming Preferences…
Action to take when last episode of the playlist finishes playing
Default handling for feed episodes (download, stream or ignore)
Select the default sort order for downloaded podcast episodes
Force BeyondPod to always use the current download path:
Do you also want to apply this setting to all existing feeds?
Do you also want to apply this setting to all existing feeds that are set to download or stream podcasts?
Number of seconds to replay (rewind) when resuming after a long pause

"This setting will take effect next time you open BeyondPod.
(Press the 'Back' key until you close all BeyondPod windows)"

"This setting will take effect next time you open BeyondPod.
(Press the 'Back' key to close BeyondPod window or just rotate your screen)"
Resume playback after a phone call
Publishes information about the currently playing episode to externally connected devices. (Enabling may break Bluetooth audio support)
"Podcast episodes are marked as 'Downloaded' when their post is marked as 'Read'"
"Podcast episodes are marked as 'Played' when their post is marked as 'Read'"
Check if you want the Android Music Player to see downloaded BeyondPod podcast episodes
"Show a thumbnail of the 'significant' post image in the list of feed posts"
Easily skip to the end of the current episode and mark episode as played
"Custom timeout (in minutes) for player's Sleep function"
File types that BeyondPod recognizes and displays
Check if you want to turn WiFi On during the feed updates.
"Battery optimization is disabled. BeyondPod is allowed to update feeds while device is 'Dozing'."
"Battery optimization is enabled. BeyondPod will NOT update feeds while device is 'Dozing'."
Schedule automatic feed updates, Toggle WiFi, Mobile Data, Episode Download…
Check if you want to automatically update the feed when it is open.
Check if you want to open external links in the device default browser.
"Screen to start on. 'Back' button will first open the 'Home' screen before closing the app."
Use hardware volume controls to navigate between feed posts
"SmartPlay automatically builds a fresh playlist from your downloaded episodes. Episodes are included based on a set of simple rules."
De URL van deze feed: %s blijkt niet geldig te zijn!
"Deze feed bestaat al in de categorie '%s'"
Tap the cast button #IMG# above to enjoy your episodes on the big screen.
"See more episodes on your screen at once. Choose 'Compact Cards' from the Menu."
"You can Delete, Download or Add to Playlist multiple episodes at once. Long press on the first episode to select it, tap to select more episodes and then pick an action from the Menu."
"Tired of manually building your playlist? Let SmartPlay do the work! Tap here to find more."
To reorder categories, drag the #IMG# icon and drop it at the desired position in the list.
To reorder the playlist, drag the #IMG# icon and drop it at the desired position in the playlist.
Tap on #IMG# to expand a category and see all feeds in it.
Your BeyondPod PRO trial will expire in %s days
Your BeyondPod PRO trial has expired!

Podcasts kunnen enkel automatisch worden gedownload via een WiFi-verbinding. Gebruik de \"Download\" knop om de individuele podcasts handmatig te downloaden. (U kunt dit instelling in het Menu > Instellings > Feed update instellingen > Download enkel via WiFi)

Podcasts kunnen momenteel enkel automatisch worden gedownload wanneer het toestel opgeladen wordt. Gebruik de \"download\" knop om de individuele podcasts manueel te downloaden. (U kunt dit wijzigen via Menu > Instellingen > Feed update instellingen > Download enkel bij laden)
De geplande update vond niet plaats omdat \"achtergrond data\" uitgeschakeld is in uw toestel. (U kunt de feeds alsnog manueel updaten).
Er is geen internetverbinding ! WiFi staat uit (en is niet ingesteld om automatisch ingeschakeld te worden tijdens het updaten).
Kan geen internetverbinding tot stand brengen! Het apparaat staat in vliegtuigmodus.
Er waren fouten tijdens de laatste update! Klik hier om de update log te raadplegen.
Your settings allow podcast downloads only when the device is plugged in. Are you sure you want to download this episode using battery power?
Your settings do not allow podcast downloads using mobile data. Are you sure you want to download this episode using your mobile data plan?
Your settings allow podcast downloads only over WiFi connection. Are you sure you want to download this episode using your mobile data plan?
Append episode to my current playlist
In the future always append selected episodes
In the future always start a new playlist
You can change this setting later in: Playlist Settings > Automatic Playlist
Selected episode will start a new playlist. Continue?
